% ============================================================
%  FairWindSK Owner's Manual --- Publication-Quality LaTeX
%  Engine: XeLaTeX | Build: bash build-manual.sh
%  Version data is auto-generated into version.tex
% ============================================================
\documentclass[a4paper,11pt,twoside,openright]{book}

% --- Fonts ---------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{DejaVu Serif}
\setsansfont{DejaVu Sans}
\setmonofont{DejaVu Sans Mono}[Scale=0.88]

% --- Auto-generated version data ----------------------------
\input{version}

% --- Math (needed for \square etc.) -------------------------
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}

% --- Page layout --------------------------------------------
\usepackage[a4paper,top=24mm,bottom=26mm,inner=28mm,outer=22mm,
            headsep=8mm,footskip=14mm,bindingoffset=5mm]{geometry}

% --- Colour palette -----------------------------------------
\usepackage[dvipsnames,table]{xcolor}
\definecolor{Navy}{HTML}{0D2B45}
\definecolor{Teal}{HTML}{1B7A8B}
\definecolor{LtBlue}{HTML}{D8EAF0}
\definecolor{LtGray}{HTML}{F2F2F2}
\definecolor{MidGray}{HTML}{E8E8E8}
\definecolor{WarnRed}{HTML}{7A1A00}
\definecolor{WarnBg}{HTML}{FFF0EC}
\definecolor{NoteBg}{HTML}{EAF5F8}
\definecolor{TipBg}{HTML}{EEF0F6}
\definecolor{GreenBg}{HTML}{EAF5EE}
\definecolor{GreenOk}{HTML}{0A5C36}
\definecolor{CodeBg}{HTML}{F4F4F4}
\definecolor{VersBg}{HTML}{E8EFF5}

% --- Typography ---------------------------------------------
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{setspace}
\setstretch{1.18}
\usepackage{parskip}
\setlength{\parskip}{6pt plus 2pt minus 1pt}
\usepackage{ragged2e}

% --- Graphics -----------------------------------------------
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\captionsetup{font={small,sf},labelfont={bf,color=Navy},
              labelsep=period,skip=6pt}
\graphicspath{{figures/}}

% --- Icon commands ------------------------------------------
% \icon{name}   --- 14 pt inline icon (e.g. inside prose)
% \iconlg{name} --- 20 pt icon for table cells
% \iconlabel{name}{text} --- icon + label, for narrative use
\newcommand{\icon}[1]{%
  \raisebox{-2.5pt}{\includegraphics[height=13pt]{icon-#1}}%
}
\newcommand{\iconlg}[1]{%
  \raisebox{-4pt}{\includegraphics[height=18pt]{icon-#1}}%
}
\newcommand{\iconlabel}[2]{%
  \iconlg{#1}\enspace{\sffamily\small\textbf{#2}}%
}

% --- Screenshots captured from the running application -------
% \screenshot[width]{filename}{caption text}
\newcommand{\screenshot}[3][0.9\textwidth]{%
  \begin{figure}[H]
    \centering
    \includegraphics[width=#1]{#2.png}
    \caption{#3}
    \label{fig:#2}
  \end{figure}}

% --- Headers & footers --------------------------------------
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[LE]{%
  \small\sffamily\color{Navy}\thepage\enspace
  \textbar\enspace FairWindSK~\fwVersion}
\fancyhead[RO]{%
  \small\sffamily\color{Navy}\leftmark\enspace
  \textbar\enspace\thepage}
\fancyfoot[C]{%
  \scriptsize\sffamily\color{gray}
  OpenFairWind Project \textbar{}
  Build~\fwBuildDate{} \textbar{}
  commit~\texttt{\fwGitHash}}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.2pt}
\fancypagestyle{plain}{%
  \fancyhf{}
  \fancyfoot[C]{\small\sffamily\color{gray}\thepage}
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}}

% --- Chapter / section titles -------------------------------
\usepackage{titlesec}

% Chapter: full-width navy banner with number + name
% Chapter title helper --- takes the title text as #1
\newcommand{\chapterbanner}[1]{%
  \colorbox{Navy}{%
    \parbox{\dimexpr\textwidth\relax}{%
      \vspace{6pt}\hspace{10pt}%
      \thechapter\enspace #1%
      \vspace{6pt}}}}

\titleformat{\chapter}[block]
  {\normalfont\sffamily\huge\bfseries\color{white}}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {\chapterbanner}
  [\vspace{2pt}\color{Teal}\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}\vspace{4pt}]

\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\sffamily\Large\bfseries\color{Navy}}
  {\thesection}{0.6em}{}
  [\vspace{-2pt}\color{Teal}\rule{\textwidth}{0.7pt}\vspace{2pt}]

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\sffamily\large\bfseries\color{Teal}}
  {\thesubsection}{0.5em}{}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalfont\sffamily\normalsize\bfseries\color{Navy}}
  {\thesubsubsection}{0.4em}{}

\titlespacing*{\chapter}{0pt}{0pt}{18pt}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{14pt}{5pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{10pt}{3pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{8pt}{2pt}

% --- Lists --------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{enumitem}
\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=2pt,topsep=4pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.8em,itemsep=2pt,topsep=4pt}
\setlist[itemize,1]{label={\color{Teal}\textbullet}}
\setlist[itemize,2]{label={\color{Navy}--},leftmargin=2.6em}

% --- Tables -------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{booktabs,longtable,tabularx,multirow,array}
\newcolumntype{L}[1]{>{\RaggedRight\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\newcolumntype{C}[1]{>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\setlength{\arrayrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.32}

% --- Callout boxes ------------------------------------------
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\tcbuselibrary{skins,breakable}

\newtcolorbox{warningbox}{
  breakable,enhanced,boxrule=0pt,leftrule=4pt,arc=3pt,
  colback=WarnBg,colframe=WarnRed,
  left=10pt,right=10pt,top=7pt,bottom=7pt,
  before skip=10pt,after skip=10pt,
  fonttitle=\sffamily\bfseries\small,fontupper=\small,
  title={\color{WarnRed}\textbf{WARNING}}}

\newtcolorbox{notebox}{
  breakable,enhanced,boxrule=0pt,leftrule=4pt,arc=3pt,
  colback=NoteBg,colframe=Teal,
  left=10pt,right=10pt,top=7pt,bottom=7pt,
  before skip=10pt,after skip=10pt,
  fonttitle=\sffamily\bfseries\small,fontupper=\small,
  title={\color{Teal}\textbf{NOTE}}}

\newtcolorbox{tipbox}{
  breakable,enhanced,boxrule=0pt,leftrule=4pt,arc=3pt,
  colback=TipBg,colframe=Navy,
  left=10pt,right=10pt,top=7pt,bottom=7pt,
  before skip=10pt,after skip=10pt,
  fonttitle=\sffamily\bfseries\small,fontupper=\small,
  title={\color{Navy}\textbf{TIP}}}

% --- Code and path commands ---------------------------------
\usepackage{listings}
\lstset{backgroundcolor=\color{CodeBg},
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\footnotesize,
  breaklines=true,frame=single,rulecolor=\color{MidGray},
  framexleftmargin=4pt,xleftmargin=6pt,
  aboveskip=6pt,belowskip=6pt}
\newcommand{\code}[1]{{\ttfamily\small\color{Navy}#1}}
\newcommand{\key}[1]{{\sffamily\small\bfseries #1}}
\newcommand{\ui}[1]{{\sffamily\small\itshape #1}}
\newcommand{\skpath}[1]{{\ttfamily\footnotesize\color{Teal}#1}}

% --- Settings tab section command ---------------------------
% Creates a visually distinct section for each settings tab
% with a full chapter heading AND a section entry in the TOC
\newcommand{\settingstab}[2]{%   #1=number  #2=name
  \section{Tab #1 --- #2}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[
    enhanced,boxrule=0pt,leftrule=0pt,arc=5pt,
    colback=Navy,colframe=Navy,
    top=6pt,bottom=6pt,left=14pt,right=14pt,
    before skip=4pt,after skip=10pt]
    {\sffamily\large\bfseries\color{white}Tab #1 --- #2}
  \end{tcolorbox}}

% --- Version info banner ------------------------------------
\newcommand{\versionbanner}{%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced,boxrule=0.8pt,arc=4pt,
    colback=VersBg,colframe=Navy,
    top=8pt,bottom=8pt,left=14pt,right=14pt,
    before skip=6pt,after skip=6pt]
    \sffamily\small
    \begin{tabular}{@{}lL{4cm}@{\quad}lL{4.5cm}@{}}
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Software: & \fwVersion &
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Commit:   & \texttt{\fwGitHash} \\
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Branch:   & \texttt{\fwGitBranch} &
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Count:    & \fwGitCount \\
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Released: & \fwGitDate &
      \color{Navy}\bfseries Built:    & \fwBuildDate \\
    \end{tabular}
  \end{tcolorbox}}

% --- Hyperlinks & PDF metadata ------------------------------
\usepackage[
  colorlinks=true,linkcolor=Navy,urlcolor=Teal,citecolor=Teal,
  bookmarks=true,bookmarksnumbered=true,
  pdfauthor={OpenFairWind Project},
  pdftitle={FairWindSK Owner's Manual v\fwVersion},
  pdfsubject={FairWindSK \fwVersion\ (\fwGitHash) --- Marine navigation display shell},
  pdfkeywords={FairWindSK, Signal K, marine, navigation, helm display}
]{hyperref}

\setcounter{tocdepth}{2}
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{3}

% ============================================================
\begin{document}

% ── TITLE PAGE ──────────────────────────────────────────────
\begin{titlepage}
  \pagecolor{Navy}
  \thispagestyle{empty}
  \vspace*{18mm}
  \begin{center}
    % Actual FairWindSK logo (signalkbrowser_icon.png, 256×256,
    % installed as fairwindsk.png on the system)
    \includegraphics[width=0.55\textwidth]{splash-logo}\\[8pt]
    {\fontsize{50}{58}\selectfont\sffamily\bfseries\color{white}FairWindSK}\\[8pt]
    {\color{Teal}\rule{0.65\textwidth}{2pt}}\\[10pt]
    {\fontsize{24}{30}\selectfont\sffamily\color{white}Owner's Manual}\\[6pt]
    {\fontsize{13}{18}\selectfont\sffamily\color{LtBlue}\itshape
      Your onboard display shell for Signal~K navigation}\\[24pt]
    % Version badge --- exact same versioning as CMakeLists.txt
    \begin{tcolorbox}[enhanced,boxrule=1pt,arc=6pt,
      colback=Navy,colframe=Teal,
      top=7pt,bottom=7pt,left=16pt,right=16pt,
      width=0.64\textwidth,halign=center,
      before skip=0pt,after skip=0pt]
      {\sffamily\color{white}\bfseries v\fwVersion}%
      \quad{\color{MidGray}|}%
      \quad{\sffamily\color{LtBlue}\texttt{\fwGitHash}}%
      \quad{\color{MidGray}|}%
      \quad{\sffamily\color{LtBlue}\fwGitDate}
    \end{tcolorbox}\vspace{18pt}
    {\small\sffamily\color{MidGray}Complete operational guide for sailors}\\[32pt]
    {\color{Teal}\rule{0.38\textwidth}{1pt}}\\[10pt]
    {\large\sffamily\color{white}Edition \fwEdition}\\[4pt]
    {\normalsize\sffamily\color{LtBlue}OpenFairWind Project}\\[3pt]
    {\small\sffamily\color{MidGray}University of Naples 'Parthenope' · DYNAMO}\\[3pt]
    {\small\sffamily\color{MidGray}Built \fwBuildDate}
  \end{center}
  \vfill
  \begin{center}
    {\color{WarnRed}\rule{0.78\textwidth}{1pt}}\\[5pt]
    {\small\sffamily\color{WarnBg}%
      FairWindSK supports onboard situational awareness.
      It does not replace lookout, seamanship, paper charts,
      or certified safety procedures.}
  \end{center}
\end{titlepage}
\nopagecolor

\clearpage\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{\fill}
